overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring an ancient Egyptian estate during sunset. The player walks through a covered pergola with hanging curtains, past a servant NPC, through gardens with palm trees, and around a pool area as the light transitions from golden hour to dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pergola walkway with hanging fabric curtains

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered pergola, approaching a central pedestal

notable_agents.action: servant sweeping the floor with a broom near the stone benches

entered.detail: wooden lattice roof covered with green vines providing partial shade
white fabric curtains hanging between stone columns, billowing slightly
carved stone benches lining the walkway on both sides
large ornate planter with red flowers and gold decorative patterns
central stone pedestal with a dark statue and offering bowls
tan mud brick wall with a dark wooden screen and wall sconces

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pergola walkway with a wooden lattice roof draped in vines and white fabric curtains. The ground is paved with tiles and red rugs. Stone benches line the path, and a servant NPC sweeps near a large decorative planter. The camera moves forward toward a central stone pedestal with a statue, bathed in warm golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open garden path between mud brick walls leading to estate building

events.description: exits covered pergola into open garden area with dirt path and palm trees
continues straight along path following the guard toward the building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt garden path toward the main building, following a guard ahead

notable_agents.action: guard walking ahead toward the building entrance through the gate

entered.detail: sandy dirt trail flanked by low stone borders and flowering plants
tall tan mud brick walls with decorative window openings lining the path
tall palm trees and dense shrubs along the garden walls
large estate building with columns and ornate entranceway
gate structure with blue painted columns and crenellated top

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered pergola, the scene opens into a sunlit garden with a dirt path flanked by mud brick walls and palm trees. The camera follows a guard walking ahead toward a large ancient building with an ornate entrance. The ground transitions from paved tiles to sandy dirt as the path leads through a gate structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back path along crenellated wall with overgrown vegetation and reflecting pool

events.description: turns right to follow the path along the back estate wall
sun sets below horizon, sky darkens to blue hour and full moon becomes visible

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking along the back wall of the estate, passing a water pool with lily pads

entered.detail: tall defensive wall with crenellated top and weathered stone surface
rectangular reflecting pool with lily pads and stone coping
large dried palm fronds scattered on the ground near the path
full moon visible in the darkening sky above the wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns right onto a narrow back path running alongside a tall crenellated stone wall. The lighting shifts dramatically to blue hour as the sun sets, and a full moon becomes visible. The path passes a rectangular water pool with lily pads and scattered palm fronds, with dense vegetation growing along the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: return path approaching exit gate with view of distant courtyard

events.description: approaching gate with view of people gathered in the torch-lit courtyard beyond

agents.ego_description: walking toward the exit gate where several people are gathered in the distance

notable_agents.action: group of people standing and conversing in the courtyard beyond the gate

entered.detail: stone gate structure leading to the outer courtyard with metal bars
open courtyard area visible through the gate with buildings and people

segments.scene_description: In the dim twilight, the camera walks along the return path toward an exit gate. The stone wall falls behind as the path opens toward a distant courtyard where a group of people can be seen gathered near torch-lit buildings. The environment is now in low light with the moon providing illumination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an ancient Egyptian estate as the warm glow of golden hour fades into a moonlit twilight. It begins within a covered pergola walkway draped in white fabric and vines, moving past a sweeping servant and stone benches toward a central statue. As the camera exits the pergola, the paved tiles transition into a sandy garden path flanked by palm trees and mud brick walls, following a guard toward an ornate building entrance. The scene then shifts as the character turns onto a narrow back path alongside a crenellated stone wall, where the lighting dramatically transforms into the blue tones of dusk and a full moon emerges over a lily-filled pool. Finally, the camera proceeds through the dim twilight toward an exit gate, leaving the stone walls behind to reveal a distant courtyard illuminated by flickering torches.
